settings.search_roots.label: Search folders
settings.search_roots.description: Folders searched by fd. Tilde paths are supported.
settings.show_hidden.label: Include hidden files
settings.show_hidden.description: Search hidden files and folders; ignored paths remain excluded.
settings.max_results.label: Maximum results
settings.max_results.description: Maximum files and folders returned per search.
settings.directory_opener.label: Folder opener
settings.directory_opener.description: Command used for folders. {path} becomes the safely quoted folder path.
settings.file_opener.label: File opener
settings.file_opener.description: Command used for files. {path} becomes the safely quoted file path.
settings.fd_command.label: fd command
settings.fd_command.description: Executable or command used for searches.
